name: Ark 21Shares Bitcoin ETF
summary: PART I DESCRIPTION OF THE TRUST The Trust is an exchange-traded fund that issues common shares of beneficial interest (the Shares) that trade on the Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc. (the Exchange) under the symbol ARKB. The Trusts investment objective is to seek to track the performance of bitcoin, as measured by the performance of the CME CF Bitcoin Reference Rate - New York Variant (the Index), adjusted for the Trusts expenses and other liabilities.
